title: Break-glass runbook

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: Break-glass runbook draft

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... count BG-ELEM, BG-COND, BG-STEP, BG-AUD, BG-FORM, BG-L5 rows and verify blocked draft markers ... NODE

notes: This is a runbook draft only; no approver, TTL value, runtime permission, staging activation, production activation, or tabletop evidence is created.
The runbook distinguishes partner override from emergency break-glass and keeps break-glass under L6 governance.
LT-L6-W03 remains open because L1-W05 approval governance, L5-W02 validation, and L6-W03-T02 tabletop evidence are not complete.

tuw_evidence.title: break-glass 탁상연습·발효 증거 조립
tuw_evidence.objective: break-glass 런북의 모의 발동 1회로 승인·시간제한·만료 회수·사후 감사 리뷰 전 단계가 실증되고, G6 'break-glass 발효' 증거가 조립된다.
acceptance_criteria: 모의 발동 1회에서 승인 기록·시간제한 타이머·만료 회수·사후 감사 리뷰 4단계 증적 전부 존재
발동 중 생성된 audit 이벤트가 런북 매핑과 일치(누락 이벤트 0)
연습에서 발견된 격차 전건 런북 개정 반영
G6 'break-glass 발효' 귀속 증거가 lt-l6-w03 폴더에 조립(파일 존재 판정)

verification_contract.method: 수동검증 — 1. staging에서 모의 발동 2. 타이머·만료 회수 관찰 3. 사후 감사 리뷰 수행 4. audit 이벤트 대사

tuw_evidence.blocked_reason: This TUW is represented for coverage only. Required deliverables and acceptance criteria remain blocked or pending until real evidence or owner-approved deferral coverage exists.
tuw_evidence.required_next_action: Provide real completion evidence for this TUW, or record valid owner-approved deferral coverage in docs/launch/launch-decision-register.md.
notes: No completion, production readiness, go-live approval, owner approval, or owner deferral is claimed by this coverage row.
Full Claude review remains waived by user instruction and is not valid review evidence.

blocked_claims: This record does not claim LT-L6-W03 or LT-L6-W03-T01 is complete.
This record does not grant break-glass or emergency override access.
This record does not assign real-person approvers or approve a final time limit.
This record does not execute a tabletop or create G6 break-glass activation evidence.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
